documents.title: Waterproof Hiking Boots
documents.content: Durable leather boots with Gore-Tex lining for all-weather trail use. Vibram sole provides excellent grip on wet rock and muddy paths.

documents.title: Summer Beach Sandals
documents.content: Lightweight open-toe sandals with quick-dry straps. Perfect for shoreline walks and water activities at the coast.

documents.title: Running Sneakers Pro
documents.content: Breathable mesh upper with responsive foam cushioning. Designed for long-distance road running and marathon training.

documents.title: Wool Winter Socks
documents.content: Merino wool blend socks with reinforced heel and toe. Moisture-wicking and thermal insulation keep feet warm in cold weather.

documents.title: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
documents.content: Waterproof wireless speaker with 12-hour battery life. Rich bass and 360-degree sound for outdoor gatherings and pool parties.

documents.title: Noise-Cancelling Headphones
documents.content: Over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation. 30-hour battery and premium memory foam ear cushions for long flights.

documents.title: Camping Hammock
documents.content: Ultralight nylon hammock for relaxing outdoors between trees. Integrated mosquito net and supports up to 200kg. Packs down to fist size for easy carrying on hikes and camping trips.

documents.title: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
documents.content: Double-wall vacuum insulated bottle for hydration on the go. Keeps drinks cold 24 hours or hot 12 hours. BPA-free and leak-proof.

documents.title: Yoga Mat Premium
documents.content: Non-slip natural rubber mat with alignment markers. Extra thick 6mm cushioning protects joints during floor exercises and stretching.

documents.title: Cycling Helmet
documents.content: Aerodynamic road cycling helmet with MIPS brain protection system. Lightweight polycarbonate shell with 14 ventilation channels.

documents.title: Camping Tent 3-Person
documents.content: Freestanding dome tent with waterproof rainfly. Sets up in under 5 minutes. Two vestibules provide gear storage space for weekend trips.

documents.title: LED Head Torch
documents.content: Rechargeable headlamp with 800 lumens and red night-vision mode. Lightweight at 75g with adjustable beam angle for trail running after dark.

documents.title: Insulated Ski Jacket
documents.content: Down-filled jacket with 10,000mm waterproof rating. Helmet-compatible hood and powder skirt keep snow out during alpine skiing.

documents.title: Fitness Tracker Watch
documents.content: Heart rate monitor with GPS tracking and sleep analysis. Tracks steps, calories, and workouts. Water-resistant to 50 meters.

documents.title: Climbing Rope 60m
documents.content: Dynamic single rope rated for lead climbing. Dry-treated sheath resists moisture absorption. 9.8mm diameter balances handling and durability.

documents.title: Kayak Paddle Carbon
documents.content: Lightweight carbon fibre paddle with adjustable ferrule. Dihedral blade design reduces flutter for efficient forward paddling on lakes and rivers.

documents.title: Compression Running Tights
documents.content: Graduated compression leggings improve blood circulation during runs. Reflective details for visibility and zip pocket for keys and phone.

documents.title: Dry Bag 20L
documents.content: Roll-top waterproof bag keeps belongings dry during kayaking, rafting, and beach trips. Welded seams and transparent window panel.

documents.title: Trail Mix Energy Bars
documents.content: Pack of 12 nut and seed bars with dark chocolate chips. High protein snack for hiking and endurance sports. No artificial flavours.

documents.title: Polarised Sunglasses
documents.content: UV400 polarised lenses reduce glare from water and snow. Lightweight frame with non-slip nose pads for cycling and fishing.

documents.title: Foam Roller Recovery
documents.content: High-density EVA foam roller for deep tissue massage and muscle recovery after intense workouts. Textured surface targets trigger points.

documents.title: Snorkel Mask Full-Face
documents.content: 180-degree panoramic viewing with anti-fog design. Dry-top snorkel prevents water entry. GoPro mount for underwater photography.

documents.title: Trekking Poles Pair
documents.content: Adjustable aluminium trekking poles with cork grips. Shock-absorbing tips reduce knee strain on steep descents and long hikes.

documents.title: Solar Power Bank
documents.content: 20,000mAh portable charger with built-in solar panel. Dual USB outputs charge phone and tablet simultaneously while camping off-grid.

documents.title: Wetsuit 3mm Full
documents.content: Neoprene full-body wetsuit for surfing and open-water swimming. Sealed seams and back zip entry. Provides warmth in waters down to 15°C.

documents.title: Resistance Bands Set
documents.content: Set of 5 latex bands in graduated strengths for home workouts. Includes door anchor, ankle straps, and carrying bag for travel fitness.

documents.title: Mountain Bike Gloves
documents.content: Padded gel cycling gloves with touchscreen-compatible fingertips. Breathable mesh back and silicone grip palm for handlebar control.

documents.title: Camping Stove Portable
documents.content: Compact gas canister stove that boils water in 3 minutes. Foldable legs and piezo ignition. Weighs just 350g for lightweight backpacking.

documents.title: Swim Goggles Racing
documents.content: Low-profile competitive swimming goggles with mirrored lenses. Adjustable nose bridge and silicone gasket seal prevent leaking during laps.

documents.title: Down Sleeping Bag
documents.content: Lightweight 800-fill goose down mummy bag rated to -10°C. Compression sack included for compact packing on multi-day treks.

documents.title: Basketball Indoor/Outdoor
documents.content: Official size 7 composite leather basketball with deep channel design for superior grip. Suitable for both indoor courts and concrete playgrounds.

documents.title: Skateboard Complete
documents.content: Canadian maple deck with 52mm wheels and ABEC-7 bearings. Concave shape suits tricks and street skating for beginners and intermediates.

documents.title: GPS Handheld Navigator
documents.content: Rugged outdoor GPS device with topographic maps and 16-hour battery. Barometric altimeter and electronic compass for backcountry navigation.

documents.title: Protein Shaker Bottle
documents.content: 700ml leak-proof shaker with wire whisk ball for smooth protein shakes. BPA-free tritan plastic and measurement markings on the side.

documents.title: Surfboard Shortboard 6ft
documents.content: High-performance epoxy shortboard with thruster fin setup. Rounded pin tail for quick turns on steep hollow waves.

documents.title: Hiking Backpack 45L
documents.content: Multi-day trekking pack with adjustable torso length and padded hip belt. Rain cover included. Multiple compartments for organised packing.

documents.title: Table Tennis Set
documents.content: Retractable net with two paddles and three balls. Clamps to any table up to 2 inches thick for instant ping pong games at home or office.

documents.title: Ski Goggles Anti-Fog
documents.content: Dual-lens ski goggles with magnetic lens swap system. OTG design fits over prescription glasses. Helmet-compatible adjustable strap.

documents.title: Jump Rope Speed
documents.content: Ball-bearing speed rope with adjustable steel cable. Lightweight handles with foam grip. Ideal for double-unders and HIIT cardio training.

documents.title: Fishing Rod Telescopic
documents.content: Carbon fibre telescopic rod that collapses to 45cm for travel. Medium action suits freshwater lake and river fishing for trout and bass.

documents.title: Climbing Chalk Bag
documents.content: Drawstring chalk bag with fleece lining and brush holder loop. Belt attachment and zippered pocket for keys. Essential for bouldering.

documents.title: Inflatable Stand-Up Paddleboard
documents.content: All-round SUP board that inflates to 15 PSI in 5 minutes. Non-slip deck pad and bungee storage for calm lake paddling and coastal touring.

documents.title: Weightlifting Belt Leather
documents.content: 10mm thick genuine leather powerlifting belt with single prong buckle. Provides lumbar support for heavy squats and deadlifts.

documents.title: Badminton Racket Pair
documents.content: Two lightweight graphite rackets with carrying case and three shuttlecocks. Pre-strung at 22 lbs tension for recreational garden play.

documents.title: Bike Repair Multi-Tool
documents.content: 16-function cycling multi-tool with allen keys, screwdrivers, chain breaker, and tyre levers. Compact enough to fit in a jersey pocket.

documents.title: Scuba Diving Fins
documents.content: Open-heel adjustable fins with channel thrust blade design. Spring heel straps for easy donning. Suitable for warm and cold water diving.

documents.title: Boxing Gloves 12oz
documents.content: Multi-layer foam padding with ventilated palm and secure velcro wrist closure. Durable synthetic leather for bag work and sparring.

documents.title: Thermal Base Layer
documents.content: Merino wool and polyester blend long-sleeve top. Flat-lock seams prevent chafing. Regulates body temperature for skiing and winter hiking.

documents.title: Frisbee Golf Disc Set
documents.content: Set of 3 discs — driver, midrange, and putter — for disc golf courses. Durable plastic in high-visibility colours with flight ratings printed.

documents.title: Action Camera Waterproof
documents.content: 4K video at 60fps with electronic image stabilisation. Waterproof to 10m without housing. Voice control and WiFi live preview on phone.
